title: CCE Labs
overview: The CCE labs support practical learning through testing, measurement, observation, and engineering interpretation across civil engineering disciplines.

labs.title: Structural Testing Area
labs.alt: Structural testing frame from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A structural testing area for observing load response and frame behavior.
labs.practicalRelevance: Supports understanding of how structural elements behave under controlled loading.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 1, embedded image 2

labs.title: Lab Instruction Room
labs.alt: Instruction room shown in the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A teaching room connected to lab briefings, demonstrations, and technical instruction.
labs.practicalRelevance: Prepares students to connect lab procedures with engineering interpretation.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 2, embedded image 1

labs.title: Surveying Laboratory
labs.alt: Surveying equipment in the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A surveying lab supporting measurement, field instruments, and spatial data collection.
labs.practicalRelevance: Surveying is essential for setting out, mapping, and site-control work in civil projects.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 3, embedded image 1

labs.title: Concrete & Materials Laboratory
labs.alt: Concrete and materials laboratory shown in the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A materials lab for civil engineering material testing and quality-related demonstrations.
labs.practicalRelevance: Materials testing supports safe construction, specification compliance, and durability decisions.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 4, embedded image 1

labs.title: Soil Mechanics Laboratory
labs.alt: Soil mechanics laboratory equipment from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A geotechnical lab for soil behavior, testing setups, and foundation-related learning.
labs.practicalRelevance: Soil mechanics supports foundation design, excavation work, and ground-condition evaluation.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 5, embedded image 1

labs.title: Meteorology Laboratory
labs.alt: Meteorology laboratory from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A lab space for environmental and meteorological observation connected to infrastructure performance.
labs.practicalRelevance: Weather and environmental conditions influence drainage, construction operations, and asset durability.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 6, embedded image 1

labs.title: Hydraulics Laboratory
labs.alt: Hydraulics laboratory equipment from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A hydraulics lab for water-flow demonstrations and fluid mechanics learning.
labs.practicalRelevance: Hydraulics supports drainage, water systems, channels, and infrastructure service design.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 7, embedded image 1

labs.title: Transportation & Asphalt Laboratory
labs.alt: Transportation and asphalt laboratory from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: A transportation and asphalt lab for pavement material and infrastructure testing concepts.
labs.practicalRelevance: Supports highway, pavement, and transport-infrastructure engineering practice.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 8, embedded image 1

labs.title: Environmental Laboratory
labs.alt: Environmental laboratory from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
labs.description: An environmental lab for observing water/environmental testing setups relevant to civil infrastructure.
labs.practicalRelevance: Environmental testing supports water quality, sustainability, and responsible infrastructure delivery.
labs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 9, embedded image 1

gallery.alt: Surveying instruments close-up from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
gallery.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 3, embedded image 2
